title: Ent Tree doubles attack damage to weapon holders

card.rawText: This creature is unaffected by creature effects and magic cards. This creature inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature holding a weapon.

plan.title: Ent Tree doubles attack damage to weapon holders
plan.summary: Ent Tree attacks a creature tagged as holding a weapon and should apply a 2x attack-damage multiplier.

notes: Set Ent Tree as player_1 primary.
Set player_2 primary to a synthetic creature with WEAPON artwork tag.

steps: Player 1 attacks the weapon-tagged defender with Ent Tree.
manualVerification: Confirm the multiplier only applies against weapon-tagged targets.
riskNotes: Weapon detection depends on artwork/runtime tags rather than a fully modeled equipment inventory.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate conditional damage multiplier against a weapon-tagged target.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
